records.ety: [Cf. F. ralit, LL. realitas. See 3d Real, and cf. 2d Realty.]

defs: The state or quality of being real; actual being or existence of anything, in distinction from mere appearance; fact.
quotes: A man fancies that he understands a critic, when in reality he does not comprehend his meaning.

defs: That which is real; an actual existence; that which is not imagination, fiction, or pretense; that which has objective existence, and is not merely an idea.
quotes: And to realities yield all her shows.
My neck may be an idea to you, but it is a reality to me.
To express our reality to the emperor.
